scripts.build: npm run build -w @remotty/shared && npm run build -w @remotty/server && npm run build -w @remotty/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @remotty/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @remotty/server" "npm run dev -w @remotty/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @remotty/shared && npm run typecheck -w @remotty/server && npm run typecheck -w @remotty/web
